title: The Gengsheng Industries Dynamic Collection
body:
Do you like 1.12? 

Do you hate how a vast majority of Tech packs run like sludge on mediocre PCs?

Let's address that.

_This Description is Very much TBD, i am only one man, so please bear with me while this slowly gets finished._


Licences Used: (Full mod list coming soon)
